# Swap Children Position

**Menu:** `Actions/Object/Hierarchy`

**Nome serializado:** `SwapChildrenPosition`

**Classe fonte:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Actions/ObjectRelated/Hierarchy/SwapChildrenPositionNode.java`

## Funcao

Troca a ordem ou a posicao dos itens envolvidos em `Swap Children Position`.
